reference: In the crease above my inner thigh, close to my vagina, I have this lump that over the last year or two has filled with this pus and thick fluid that is a mix of pus and blood when it is popped or bursts on its own after getting big enough. It is painful when I walk, as my clothing rubs against it, and it is sore to the touch. This is a recurring issue. What is it, and do I need to go to the doctor as soon as possible? Thank you.
